title: pkg/machine: Read stderr from ssh-keygen correctly
body:
Read stderr from ssh-keygen before calling wait(), since cmd.Wait() closes cmd.StderrPipe() after it exits.

Found this when hunting for the [key generation flake](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/5140729566068736/logs/test.log#t--podman-machine-start-start-simple-machine--1) from the [uncategorized flakes issue](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/22551). I'm not sure if this fixes it, since no machine flakes have been triggering for me since last Thursday, but since it's a bug it's worth fixing anyway.
